# skills/

Two conventions live here. Both are intentional — do not merge them.

## `skills/shared/<name>/SKILL.md` — curated, hand-maintained
Portable task skills shared across Claude Code and Codex. Each folder has one `SKILL.md` with:
- YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- **When to use** + **When NOT to use**
- Routes, scripts, and IDs needed

Edited manually. Mirrored locally at `~/.agents/skills/<name>/`, symlinked into
`~/.claude/skills/` and `~/.codex/skills/`.

## `skills/SKILL_<filename>.md` — auto-generated by 4AM agent
Flat `.md` files written by `scripts/4am_agent/pattern_learner.py` when it detects
a recurring error pattern. The writer hardcodes `path = f"skills/{filename}"` —
do not move these into subfolders or the pipeline will regress.

Current auto-generated files:
- `SKILL_4am_agent.md` — the pipeline itself
- `SKILL_fix_unicode_encoding.md`
- `SKILL_force_utf8_encoding.md`
- `SKILL_handle_low_view_scraping_targets.md`

If one of these ever needs to become a first-class portable skill, COPY it into
`skills/shared/<name>/SKILL.md` and leave the original flat file alone.
